name: [AT] STP Requests Notifier
description: Automatically notifies the team via email and Slack when a new STP request is created in Airtable, including the role, client, company, rate, target start date, required MVA, hard requirements, JD link, and STP code.

parameters.content:
### STP REQUESTS AUTOMATION

What this does:
- Triggers whenever a new **STP Request record** is created in Airtable
- Pulls request details
- Formats the data into a **notification message**
- Sends the notification via:
  - **Email** (structured digest)
  - **Slack** (quick snapshot)

Runs: On new STP Request record creation

parameters.jsCode:
// ========== Extract Fields from Webhook ========== const rec = $input.first().json.body.records[0]; // webhook payload root function clean(s){ return String(s || "").trim(); } const role = clean(rec.role?.[0] || "Unspecified Role"); const client = clean(rec.clients?.[0] || "Unknown Client"); const jdLink = clean(rec.jd_profile?.[0] || ""); const employmentType = clean(rec.employment_type || "N/A"); const targetStartDate = clean(rec.target_start_date || "N/A"); const company = clean(rec.company?.[0] || "N/A"); const rate = rec.final_client_rate ? `$${rec.final_client_rate}/hr` : "N/A"; const hardRequirement = clean(rec.hard_requirement || "N/A"); const stpCode = clean(rec.stp_code || "N/A"); // ========== Build HTML Body ========== const emailBody = `

Hello TA Team,

PLACEMENTS DETAILS
Role ${role}
Client ${client}
Company ${company}
Employment Type ${employmentType}
Client Rate ${rate}
Target Start Date ${targetStartDate}
Hard Requirement ${hardRequirement}
JD + Client Profile ${jdLink ? `${jdLink}` : "Link unavailable"}
STP Code ${stpCode}

Please use the reference code ${stpCode} for easy tracking and documentation.

Should you have any questions or need additional details, feel free to reach out at your convenience.

Thank you!

Best regards,
Placements Team
Scale Virtually

`; // ========== Output ========== return [{ json: { emailBody } }];

return [ { json: { emailBody: `

STP REQUEST DETAILS

Hello TA Team,

Role ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].role[0]}
Client ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].clients[0]}
Company ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].company[0]}
Employment Type ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].employment_type}
Client Rate ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].final_client_rate}
Target Start Date ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].target_start_date}
Required MVA ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].requiredMva || "N/A"}
Hard Requirement ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].hard_requirement}
JD + Client Profile View Document
STP Code ${$input.first().json.body.records[0].stp_code}

Please use the reference code above for easy tracking and documentation.

Should you have any questions or need additional details, feel free to reach out at your convenience.

Thank you!
Placements Team
Scale Virtually

` } } ];
